Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0A05 "AIRSUPPORT-9500-0A05" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$3d sta $01 jsr $9500 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Air Support.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $9500 which: 1. Turns off interrupts from the two CIA chips and acks any pending CIA interrupts 2. Calls the init subroutine at $09E8 from the original game code
The game is also patched to stop it crashing on PAL machines when a key is pressed as follows:
1. Changed the AND #$F0 instruction at $780C to AND #$70 2. Changed the AND #$F8 instruction at $792E, $79A3 and $79CB to AND #$78
All of these allow the screen control register ($D011) to be updated without crashing the game.
